subject: [PATCH v3 01/10] fuse: separate next request fetching from sending logic

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch separates the logic of fetching the next request from sending it, making the control flow clearer and reducing unnecessary parameter passing. It removes duplicated code in fuse_uring_send_next_to_ring() and introduces a new function fuse_uring_get_next_fuse_req() to fetch the next request. The send operation is now handled by a separate function fuse_uring_send(). This change simplifies the logic for handling requests and improves maintainability.
